description: Bill of release, issued by Abū Kathīr Efrayim b. Maṣliaḥ al-Ghazzī to Abū Isḥāq Avraham ha-Levi. Signed by Yefet b. Menashshe, ʿOvadya b. […], and Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi, who also wrote the document. Dated: Ṭevet 1416 Seleucid, which is 1105 CE. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
